language_coverage_note: EN and ZH come from OpenHowNet's bundled BabelNet (Qi 2019/2022). JA and KO are EMPTY across all 15,755 synsets in the bundle — the API exposes ja_synonyms/ko_synonyms fields but the underlying data has no entries. JA/KO candidates must be CONSTRUCTED by native-speaker collaborators using EN/ZH as anchors, per docs/design/alignment_protocol.md.
